title: HealthResponse
description: Liveness probe response from GET /v1/health. Cheap by design — no fresh dependency probing. `/v1/discovery` is the readiness probe.

status.description: `ok` unless the (opportunistically-read) discovery cache shows a tracked dependency unreachable, then `degraded`. Always `ok` on cold start — check `dependencies_probed`.

dependencies_probed.description: False until /v1/discovery has warmed the dependency cache. Lets a consumer tell 'deps checked and healthy' apart from 'deps never probed'.

dependencies.description: Per-dependency reachability summary from the discovery cache. Omitted on cold start (before /v1/discovery has run).
